Our Introduction Movie is On Air

17.07.2024

Ibn Haldun University's inctroductional film offers viewers a broad perspective from which they can gain insight into many areas from life at IHU to academic career opportunities.

Ibn Haldun University's introduction movie was released in Turkish and English. The movie, which took a week to shoot, was ready for publication after a meticulous post-production process.

Filmed in Başakşehir Ibn Haldun University Complex, Fatih Süleymaniye Campus, and Bakırköy Taş Mektep Campus, the film provides the audience with the opportunity to get to know the mission of our University with the idea of becoming a world-class university in social sciences and the characteristics of the education and training processes carried out within the framework of this mission.

The introduction movie also provides details about Ibn Haldun University's qualified educational environment as “Turkey's Social Sciences Base” and the wide range of social, cultural, and sports opportunities it offers to the students.
